title: I Found IRL Misato and Shinji
display_title: I Found IRL Misato and Shinji
wikitext:
[]: I Found IRL Misato and Shinji             Quote Post by ACGT-Samael » Wed Jan 15, 2020 1:58 pm So this isn't the most serious of posts, but I found this story hilariously disturbing in the context of Misato and Shinji. This is a story from Reddit's Legal Advice sub about a middle school teacher who has taken in a 15 year old boy with a difficult home life. Thing is... that 15 year old sleeps in the same bed as her. As best I can tell the intentions seemed more innocent at first, but it started coming out over time (courtesy of the teacher's daughter) that more was going on. So basically we have an unmarried older woman taking in a younger boy neglected by his parents, and engaging in an inappropriate relationship with him, while a 3rd person - a younger woman - observes from the same living space. For bonus points, remember that Misato's dub VA primarily works as a school teacher. Apart from being a bizarre case of Life Imitating Art, it kinda puts a spotlight on how weird Misato and Shinji's living arrangements actually were, especially as things progressed and lines got blurry.

[]: Re: I Found IRL Misato and Shinji             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Jan 16, 2020 12:07 pm Well, that I did not see coming. Excuse me while I go pick up my jaw, must have dropped it somewhere...

[]: Re: I Found IRL Misato and Shinji             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Fri Jan 17, 2020 12:32 am ACGT-Samael wrote: Misato's dub VA primarily works as a school teacher.

[]: Re: I Found IRL Misato and Shinji             Quote Post by Zoop » Fri Jan 17, 2020 5:29 am ACGT-Samael wrote: For bonus points, remember that Misato's dub VA primarily works as a school teacher.

[]: Re: I Found IRL Misato and Shinji             Quote Post by ACGT-Samael » Sat Jan 18, 2020 5:39 pm Tumbling Down wrote: Which VA?

This is a story from Reddit's Legal Advice sub about a middle school teacher who has taken in a 15 year old boy with a difficult home life. Thing is... that 15 year old sleeps in the same bed as her. As best I can tell the intentions seemed more innocent at first, but it started coming out over time (courtesy of the teacher's daughter) that more was going on. So basically we have an unmarried older woman taking in a younger boy neglected by his parents, and engaging in an inappropriate relationship with him, while a 3rd person - a younger woman - observes from the same living space. For bonus points, remember that Misato's dub VA primarily works as a school teacher. Apart from being a bizarre case of Life Imitating Art, it kinda puts a spotlight on how weird Misato and Shinji's living arrangements actually were, especially as things progressed and lines got blurry.
